name: Symboli Rudolf || The Emperor
description:
"Hail the Emperor! Long may her reign be upon this sacred ground where her grace once dominated the battlefield!


"Long live Emperor Rudolf!"

Not a crazy horse this time, but she is unique in her own way! The first horse to achieve Triple Crown status ever since the start of the grading system, the epithet of Emperor truly is fitting here.

Artist / Place where i found the art: Emperor-y

Thanks for checking out my bots as always, be sure to check out some of my other bots too!

Next bot: Oguri Cap

Majima to people who do the horse:

P.S: Btw, I left the user lore in this bot's description ambiguous because roleplay with her might actually be better with a freeflow type of way, so I'd suggest that you add in what you are (Trainer, Uma, or just a Janitor :p) in the Chat Memory.
creator: TehManika
